page_metadata.biotools__summary: Program to predict genes by comparing anonymous genomic sequences from different species. It combines tblastx, a sequence similarity search program, with geneid, an ab initio gene prediction program.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Program to predict genes by comparing anonymous genomic sequences from different species. It combines tblastx, a sequence similarity search program, with geneid, an ab initio gene prediction program.
